changes_made.description: Compressed original 212-line skill by removing redundant sections: merged 'When to Use' into frontmatter, eliminated Complete Simulation Loop Skeleton (duplicated PID+thermal sections), converted Common Mistakes table to compact bullet list, tightened prose throughout. Reduced to ~80 lines but provided only code fragments, not complete runnable scripts.
changes_made.result: 0/100 on both tasks — model (qwen3.5-397b) read scenario.json but failed to generate and execute complete Python scripts. Fragments weren't sufficient.

changes_made.description: Restructured to provide complete, copy-pasteable Python scripts for both thermal and cruise control patterns (matching targeted skill approach), while still compressing PID class, removing duplicate explanations, and tightening critical rules. Key insight: weaker models need near-complete runnable patterns, not conceptual fragments.
changes_made.result: 100/100 on both tasks. 39% size reduction from original (211→129 lines) while maintaining full scores.
